summary: Data Science student at MS Ramaiah University of Applied Sciences and aspiring data scientist & tech entrepreneur, focused on solving real-world problems through technology.
longBio: I have hands-on experience in data analysis, machine learning, and visualization, with a strong foundation in Python, SQL, and Power BI. I enjoy working with data to extract insights, build predictive models, and support data-driven decision-making. I am actively working on real-world, industry-oriented projects while continuously strengthening my skills in data science and analytics. Long-term goal: to build and contribute to technology-driven solutions across multiple industries in India.
